ab: Inaak kaviaz qai tupa’un tu Talum, isia amin naipa Bunun siduq tu uvaz’az.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Talum，他也是布農族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Talum, and he is also an Bunun child.

ab: Muskun azam ihaan Izukan tu asang masisipul patasan.
ch: 我們一起在卓溪崙天部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Izukan tribe.

ab: Masiqailis azam muskun tan’a madadaingaz taqu paliqabasan, maqansiap amin azam malasBunun.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說布農語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Bunun proficiently.

ab: Malaungkav azak tu masmuq amin, manisnis makuis a Talum.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Talum很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Talum is short and thin.

ab: Matanaqtaq a Talum, mazima amin azam istaa.
ch: Talum很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Talum is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
